title: 4 PCS Windscreen Washer Wiper Pump Spray Motor Rubber Grommet Sealing Cap 443955465 Compatible with VW Santana T3 T4 T5 Car Accessories
features: These durable rubber grommets provide a watertight seal for wiper pump installations, preventing leaks and corrosion.
A fit replacement part specifically designed for VW transporter models, these sealing caps ensure proper washer system pressure.

Protect your wiper pump connections with these heavy-duty grommets that absorb vibration and reduce noise. The reinforced design prevents tearing during installation and maintains seal integrity through seasons of use.

This 4-piece set provides multiple replacements for aging or cracked seals. The flexible material compresses evenly to create reliable seals on both flat and curved mounting surfaces in engine compartments.
Replaces old hardened and cracked windshield washer pump grommets,Rubber material, corrosion resistant, heat and ozone resistant, strong yet flexible for a long service life
description: Features Compatible with VW Golf Cabrio 1979 - 2002. Compatible with VW Polo Classic 1996 - 2002. Compatible with VW Passat 1974 - 2007. Compatible with VW Caddy 1983-2007 Compatible with VW Jetta 1979-1992. Compatible with VW Pheaton 2002-2007. Compatible with VW Bus T3 1980-1992. Compatible with VW Bus T4 / T5 1991 - 2007 Specifications Size: Diameter 16.3mm, Height 9mm Material: Rubber Color: Black Package Includes 4 x Rubber Grommet
